title: Gorilla Tack, 112g - Low Residue Tack for Indoor & Outdoor Application | Reusable, Removable Tack for Hanging Lightweight items and Arts & Crafts | 168 Pre-Cut Squares, Grey
features: LOW RESIDUE: Gorilla Tack offers a no mess, low residue formula, ensuring clean application and removal without leaving behind sticky residues. Do not use on highly absorbent surfaces such as bare plaster or recently decorated surfaces/delicate wallpaper.
INDOOR AND OUTDOOR: Versatile indoor and outdoor use, making it perfect for securing items on walls, ceilings, floors, and even outdoor surfaces, offering reliable adhesion wherever you need it.

BEST FOR: Gorilla Tack is reusable and removable tack. It is easily repositionable and removable without damaging surfaces, making it ideal for hanging lightweight items and perfect for arts and crafts projects
2X MORE THAN GORILLA WHITE TACK: Includes 168 pre-cut squares for twice the coverage of Gorilla White Tack, ensuring you have an ample supply for all your hanging and mounting needs.

HOW TO USE: Ensure all surfaces are clean and dry. Tear off a square of Gorilla Grey Tack and lightly roll into a ball. Place between the two surfaces and press firmly for a few seconds. To remove, carefully peel tack from the surface to lift excess tack.

Grips rough & smooth surfaces with ease, indoor & out. Our Crystal Clear Double Sided Mounting Tape, with 2.5x more tape (compared to Gorilla Crystal Clear Mounting Tape 1.5m). Mounts a wide range of materials with a strong, permanent bond. Grips rough & smooth surfaces with ease, indoor & out. Easy to apply pre-cut double sided squares that lends itself to a wide range of projects and crafts. With the same strong, permanent bond of our Crystal Clear Double Sided Mounting Tape. Mounts a wide range of materials with a strong, permanent bond. Grips rough & smooth surfaces with ease, indoor & out, and is even stronger than our Clear Double Sided Mounting Tape.
